title: The Admiral Tests the Straw Hats
description: Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Aokiji, Nico Robin, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji. Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Thank you all for helping me.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are you trying to poison us!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is the extend of the power

summary: Aokiji arrives on Long Ring Long Land, shifting the mood from comedy to danger with one of the Navy’s strongest officers.
